name: Paralytic Saliva Swapping
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName]'s long tongue gently swirls around [TargetName]'s mouth as [AttackerHeOrShe] trades mouthfuls of saliva with [TargetHimOrHer], lewdly slurping and sucking on [TargetHisOrHer] tongue, forcing [TargetHimOrHer] to drink down [AttackerHisOrHer] sweetly sour saliva.
miss: [AttackerName]'s long tongue gently swirls around [TargetName]'s mouth as [AttackerHeOrShe] trades mouthfuls of saliva with [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: As the kiss drags on, numbing paralysis slowly seeps into [TargetName] from [AttackerName]'s venom soaked saliva filling [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, and all [TargetHeOrShe] can manage to do is gulp down more of the numbing toxin.
